notYetReady: We will be releasing a feature to let you automate sending out reminder WhatsApp messages to your students. You can create your message templates first.

form.name: Template Name
form.nameRequirements: Lowercase alphanumeric characters and underscores only
form.isDefault: Set this template as default template
form.isDefaultDescription: If set as default, all other template with same assigned function will be set as non-default templates
form.alertPendingTemplateDescription: This template is pending approval. Cannot be used for sending messages.
form.alertUnsubmittedTemplateDescription: This template is unsubmitted. Cannot be used for sending messages.
form.alertRejectedTemplateDescription: This template is rejected. Cannot be used for sending messages.
form.twilioIntegrationDescription: Configure your Twilio credentials to send WhatsApp messages.

delete.title: Delete Template
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this template?
